en.title: Automotive Technology
en.desc: Get hands-on under the hood. Students develop diagnostic, repair, and maintenance expertise aligned with ASE certification standards — preparing for high-demand careers in the automotive service industry.

postsec.name: AAS in Automotive Technology
postsec.note: NATEF-accredited 2-year program with fully equipped labs; the most common pathway to ASE certification.

postsec.name: Lincoln Tech / Universal Technical Institute
postsec.note: Accelerated 12–18 month programs with manufacturer-sponsored training tracks and direct dealership placement.

postsec.name: GM ASEP / Ford FACT / Toyota T-TEN
postsec.note: OEM-sponsored programs at community colleges — students earn while training and graduate directly into dealership jobs.

postsec.name: ASE Certification (8+ Areas)
postsec.note: The national gold standard for automotive professionals; certifications cover engine repair, brakes, electrical, HVAC, and more.

careers.title: Automotive Technician
careers.desc: Diagnose and repair mechanical and electronic vehicle systems at dealerships, independent shops, or fleet services.

careers.title: Service Advisor
careers.desc: Serve as the bridge between customers and the service department, estimating costs and coordinating repairs.

careers.title: Master Technician
careers.desc: Holding all ASE certifications, master techs tackle the most complex diagnostic and repair challenges in the shop.

careers.title: Shop Foreman / Service Manager
careers.desc: Lead a team of technicians, manage workflow, maintain quality standards, and oversee shop operations.

financial.name: Federal Pell Grant
financial.note: Up to $7,395/year for eligible students. Apply via FAFSA at studentaid.gov.

financial.name: ASE Education Foundation Scholarships
financial.note: Annual scholarships specifically for students enrolled in NATEF-accredited automotive programs across the country.

financial.name: Manufacturer Dealer Sponsorships
financial.note: GM, Ford, Honda, and Toyota partner with dealerships to sponsor student tuition in exchange for a post-graduation commitment.

financial.name: WIOA Workforce Training Grants
financial.note: Career and technical training grants are available through local workforce development boards for eligible students.

es.title: Tecnología Automotriz
es.desc: Trabaja directamente con los vehículos. Los estudiantes desarrollan experiencia en diagnóstico, reparación y mantenimiento alineada con los estándares de certificación ASE.

postsec.name: AAS en Tecnología Automotriz
postsec.note: Programa de 2 años acreditado por NATEF con laboratorios completamente equipados.

postsec.name: Lincoln Tech / Universal Technical Institute
postsec.note: Programas acelerados de 12–18 meses con colocación directa en concesionarias.

postsec.name: GM ASEP / Ford FACT / Toyota T-TEN
postsec.note: Programas patrocinados por fabricantes — los estudiantes ganan mientras se capacitan.

postsec.name: Certificación ASE (más de 8 áreas)
postsec.note: El estándar nacional de oro para profesionales automotrices.

careers.title: Técnico Automotriz
careers.desc: Diagnostica y repara sistemas mecánicos y electrónicos en concesionarias, talleres independientes o flotas.

careers.title: Asesor de Servicios
careers.desc: Sirve de enlace entre los clientes y el departamento de servicio, estimando costos y coordinando reparaciones.

careers.title: Técnico Maestro
careers.desc: Con todas las certificaciones ASE, los técnicos maestros abordan los desafíos más complejos del taller.

careers.title: Capataz / Gerente de Servicios
careers.desc: Dirige un equipo de técnicos, gestiona el flujo de trabajo y supervisa las operaciones del taller.

financial.name: Beca Federal Pell
financial.note: Hasta $7,395/año para estudiantes elegibles. Solicitar vía FAFSA en studentaid.gov.

financial.name: Becas de la Fundación Educativa ASE
financial.note: Becas anuales para estudiantes inscritos en programas automotrices acreditados por NATEF.

financial.name: Patrocinios de Concesionarias
financial.note: GM, Ford, Honda y Toyota patrocinan la matrícula de estudiantes a cambio de un compromiso laboral post-graduación.

financial.name: Becas WIOA para Capacitación
financial.note: Las becas de capacitación técnica están disponibles a través de las juntas locales de desarrollo de la fuerza laboral.
